title: cyperus cephalophorus
intro: Cyperus cephalophorus, also known as the Dwarf Papyrus Sedge, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus cephalophorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections. It is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs for various health remedies.
